overall.description: First-person survival horror game footage showing a player navigating a dark forest trail at night using a flashlight. The player moves through dense woodland vegetation, passes through a narrow rocky passage, and wields a wooden stick weapon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick underbrush

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through dense forest, flashlight illuminating the immediate path ahead

entered.detail: tall trees forming a dark canopy overhead, barely visible against the night sky
narrow winding dirt trail with scattered leaves and small rocks
dense green foliage and bushes lining the left side of the path
dense green foliage and bushes lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow forest trail at night, surrounded by dense vegetation on both sides. The flashlight illuminates the dirt path ahead while tall trees form a dark canopy overhead. No other characters or structures are visible in this secluded woodland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path with scattered tree trunks

events.description: slight left turn to navigate around a large tree trunk blocking the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail, making slight turns to avoid trees and maintain path

entered.detail: thick tree trunk temporarily visible on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the dense forest, navigating slight turns around tree trunks that occasionally appear along the narrow dirt path. The vegetation remains thick on both sides with individual trees passing by as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest passage with steep stone walls

events.description: player character raises and holds a wooden stick weapon in the left hand
entering a narrow passage between rocky cliff walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the rocky passage while wielding a wooden stick, scanning the surroundings

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock wall rising steeply on the right side of the path
rocky outcrop and boulders on the left side creating a narrow passage
blood-stained wooden stick held in the left hand, visible in the lower left of the frame

segments.scene_description: The player draws a wooden stick weapon and enters a narrow rocky passage between steep stone walls. The dense vegetation gives way to bare rock faces as the flashlight illuminates the confined space. The blood-stained weapon remains visible in the left hand as the player cautiously advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transitioning from rocky area

events.description: exiting the rocky passage and returning to the forested area with vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the environment opens back up into forest, still holding the wooden stick

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk lying across the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The player exits the rocky passage and returns to the forested trail, passing a fallen log on the right side. The wooden stick weapon remains in hand as the dense vegetation returns, surrounding the path once again. The flashlight continues to illuminate the way forward through the dark woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, secluded forest that briefly transitions into a confined rocky corridor before returning to the dense woodland. It begins on a narrow dirt path where a flashlight cuts through the darkness, illuminating thick vegetation and a heavy canopy of tall trees. As the camera navigates slight turns around tree trunks, the lush greenery gradually gives way to a narrow rocky passage with steep stone walls. The scene shifts as the player draws a blood-stained wooden stick, cautiously advancing through the bare rock faces before exiting the corridor. Finally, the environment opens back into the forested trail, passing a fallen log as the dense vegetation once again closes in around the path.
